verses.text: Topa' tungah lungdamna ko un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi
“Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” Israel-te in ci ta uh hen
“Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” Aaron innkuante in ci ta uh hen
“Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” amah a zahtakte in ci ta uh hen
Ka cihmawhna-ah Topa ka sam a, Topa in hong dawngin mun tanzau-ah hong koih hi
Topa in kei hong ompih hi. Bangmah ka kihta kei ding hi. Mihingte in kei, bang hong cihzo ding ahi uh hiam
Kei hong huh dingin kei lamah Topa om hi. Kei hong mudahte pen gualzawhna tawh ka en ding hi
Mi i muan' sangin Topa belh ding hoihzaw hi
Uliante i muan' sangin Topa belh ding hoihzaw hi
Minam khempeuh in kei hong umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa' vang tawh amaute ka sugawp hi
Amaute in ka kimkotah kei hong umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa' vang tawh amaute ka sugawp hi
Amaute in khuaipi bangin kei hong umcih uh a, ahi zongin selkeu kuang bangin amaute daikik pak uh hi. Topa' vang tawh amaute ka sugawp hi
Kei ka pukna dingin nakpi takin hong kisawn a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi
Topa in a vanglian, a thahatin kei hong bawl a, amah pen kei a hong honpa ahi hi
Ngai un! Thuman mite' puanbuk sungah gualzawh lungdamna la kisa a, “ Topa' taklam khut in a lian nate hih khin hi
Topa' taklam khut kipahtawi a, Topa' taklam khut in a lian nate hih khin hi,” kici hi
Kei ka si kei ding a, ka hing ding hi. Topa' sepnate ka gengen ding hi
Topa in nasia takin kei hong thuhilh a, ahih hangin kei hong sisaklo hi
Topa' tungah lungdamna ko-in ka lut theihna dingin biakinn kongpite kei hong hon in
Hih pen Topa' kongpi ahi hi. Thuman mi bek hih kongpi-ah lut ding hi
Nangmah in kei hong dawngin, hong honkhia na hih manin nangma tungah ka lungdam hi
Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi
Hih pen Topa' nasepna hi a, eite' mitah lamdang hi
Hih ni pen Topa' hong piak ni hi a, eite lungdamin i kipak ding hi
Topa aw, kote hong hon in; hong thum ung. Topa aw, kong thum uh hi; kote hong daupaisak in
Topa' min tawh hong paipa in thupha ngah ta hen. Topa' inn panin nang kong phat uh hi
Topa pen Pasian ahi hi. Amah in eite tungah nopsakna hong piazo hi. Na khut uhah singhiang tawi-in, biakna tau kimkotin pai un
Nang pen keima Pasian na hi a, nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko ding hi. Nang pen keima Pasian na hi a, nangmah kong phat ding hi
Topa tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi.
